'''Sabrix''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. A [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation led by [[Denedin]] extracted [[Radiation/Legends|radioactive]] elements from the planet to fund the [[Sabrin Ring]].

{{Planet-stub}}
